title: Recover From Missing Updates Selection
goal: Reach the updates question, trigger the missing-selection validation error, recover from it, and stop on the check-answers page.
instruction: Complete the travel support prototype until the updates question. If the page rejects a missing selection, correct it and continue to the check-answers page.

steps.explanation: I entered the applicant name so the service can move to the next question.
The name is complete, so I am moving to the updates question.
The page should now report that no updates option was selected yet.

postconditions.value: Select whether you want email updates

steps.explanation: I selected no email updates to satisfy the missing required choice.
The required choice is now set, so I am moving to the review page.

postconditions.value: Check your answers before sending your application

action.summary: I recovered from the missing updates selection and reached the check-answers page on the no-email branch.

steps.explanation: The review page is visible with the corrected branch, so I am ending the task.
